title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 06 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 06 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 06 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 06/06/2025
Today, DCE iron ore futures market continued to exhibit a fluctuating trend, holding up well. The most-traded contract I2509 eventuallyclosed at 707.5, with a daily increase of 0.86%. Traders showed moderate enthusiasm for selling, while steel mills adopted a cautious wait-and-see aƫtude, with purchase willingness weakening slightly as the weekend approached.
